workouts.name: TCS World 10K Bangalore — Race
workouts.notes: Official chip: 1:12:44 · avg 7:17/km · 8.2 km/h. Mat splits: 2.5k 15:56 (6:23/km) → 5k 35:24 (segment 7:47/km) → 7.2k 52:23 (7:43/km) → 8.6k 1:02:52 → 10k 1:12:44. Front-loaded blowout (6:23 → 7:47/km drop in 2.5km), final 1.4km kicked at 7:03/km.

raceResults.notes: Official chip 1:12:44 (Strava-GPS was 1:12:13 — chip is authoritative; 31s diff = mat-to-mat vs press-start). Avg pace 7:17/km · 8.2 km/h · bib 6624. Goal sub-65 missed. Beat Riegel 10K projection from 35:40 5K (74:24) by 1:40 despite mid-race blowup. Strongest data point: final 1.4km at 7:03/km after walking through km 3-7 — kick is real, pacing discipline is the limiter.

wentWrong: Front-loaded blowout: 6:23/km opening 2.5km → 7:47/km next 2.5km. That's a 22% pace drop inside one 5K — textbook 5K-effort-too-early signature.
First 2.5k = 9.4 km/h; next 5k averaged 7.7 km/h. The aerobic ceiling was breached before the mat at 5K, not at km 5 as Strava-GPS suggested.
HR pinned at 178-181 from km 3 onwards (92-94% max). 10K effort lives at ~85% max for someone with this profile — was racing at 5K HR for 10K distance.
Mid-race walk (km 3-7 zone) cost ~3 minutes vs target pace.
Strava-GPS km splits are auto-paced per km with auto-pause and don't match mat splits — chip data is the truth.
wentRight: Final 1.4km segment ran 7:03/km — fastest pace post-bonk. Kick was genuine, not just survival.
8.6km segment kicked from 7:21 to 7:03 — negative-split FINISH. The engine returned once panic eased.
Beat Riegel 5K-to-10K projection from 35:40 5K (74:24) by 1:40. Aerobic fitness is real; pacing was the failure mode, not capacity.
No injury, no DNF, finished standing.
Chip vs Strava: 31s difference is normal start-mat-vs-press-start lag. Race execution data quality is good.
fixForNextRace: Hard pace cap on km 1: target 6:45-7:00/km, NOT 5:48. Watch face says 'too fast' until km 2.5, no exceptions.
Hard HR cap on km 1-5: 170 bpm. Walk 30 sec if it spikes above 175.
Carb fuel: 30g 60-min pre-race (banana + 1 gel), 1 gel at the 5K mat (NOT km 5 of run).
Even-split protocol: target 7:00/km × 10 = 70:00. First 5k at 7:00/km, last 5k at 7:00/km. Negative split is the goal, not the prayer.
Weight delta math: 93 → 85kg = ~24 sec/km off = ~4 min off the 10K. The diet IS the engine for sub-65.
postMortem.realisticNextTarget: Sub-70:00 at Vedanta Delhi Half Marathon prep block (Oct 2026) — even-paced 7:00/km × 10 with the kick actually intact instead of paying back debt. Sub-65 requires 5K PB to drop to ~31:00 (currently 35:40) AND weight at 82-85 kg — both are 6-month projects. The Hyrox Delhi prep build (Apr 27 - Jul 25) will move both needles.
